description_long: This object consists of two distinct house structures situated on a rectangular green plot with a paved driveway or walkway connecting them. The house on the left features a steep gable roof, two stories, and a symmetrical facade with multiple windows and a central entryway, flanked by small trees or shrubs. The house on the right is a single-story building with a flat roof, a prominent front entrance with an arched portico, and a more modern, boxy appearance. Both houses are rendered in light colors, with the left house having a darker roof and the right house appearing almost entirely white. The plot is open and grassy, with the buildings spaced apart and oriented parallel to the longer edge of the lot. The overall scene suggests a suburban or residential neighborhood setting, with clear separation between the two homes.
description: Two distinct houses on a grassy lot: one is a two-story gable-roofed home with a central entry, the other a single-story flat-roofed house with an arched entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing both houses side by side, with the gable-roofed house on the left and the flat-roofed house with an arched entry on the right.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back sides of both houses and the paved driveway extending from the foreground to the left house.
description_view_2: Side view showing the flat-roofed house in the foreground and the gable-roofed house further back, with visible windows and greenery.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the gable-roofed house and the side of the flat-roofed house, with the driveway and trees visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on the gable-roofed house, asymmetrical placement on the flat-roofed house
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with small steps and shrubs on the gable-roofed house; arched portico entrance on the flat-roofed house
